name: FileBrowser Quantum
longDescription:
FileBrowser Quantum is a self-hosted web-based file manager and a major fork of FileBrowser. It features multi-source configuration, real-time indexed search, OIDC/LDAP/JWT authentication, and rich media previews.

Configured via a config.yaml file supporting multiple sources, each with its own host path. Includes fast indexed search across large directories and improved performance over the original FileBrowser.
description: A self-hosted web-based file manager with multi-source config and real-time indexed search.
